writer.name: 伊恩·德拉罗萨 Ian de la Rosa

introduction: The film tells how Bea, a 50-year-old music producer, is going through a tough time as she is separating from her husband. The day she has to leave the home where she has lived for twenty years, she finds everything a mess and someone asleep in her bed: Denis, 28, who, despite having a degree, struggles with job insecurity and lack of opportunities. After partying with his friends, the boy has sneaked into her house. Instead of calling the police, the two strangers will spend three days together. But after that time, they must each go their separate ways.
